description: The Attach Mesh node allows one to attach a provided Uri as a new StaticMesh component and return the StaticMesh raw IAsset`1 itself.

fields.URL: The URI of the asset you want to attach. Can be a resdb or a local or a website hosted asset.
fields.Target: The slot to attach the asset to.
fields.GetExisting: Get an existing asset on Target (Slot) of the same URL (uri) or attach a new one.
fields.Next: Fires after * (Call) is called and the asset was successfully attached.
fields.AttachedProvider: The attached provider or an existing one on Target (Slot) if GetExisting (bool) is true.
